title: FRUSE Dinosaur Toys for Boys 3-5 with Interactive Sound Book,12 Pcs Dinosaurs Figures,Dinosaur Book with Sound,Toddler Dinosaur Learning Toys,Dino Present for Boys and Girls Age 3 4 5 6 7 8
features: 【The Wonderful World Hidden in Dinosaur Books】The moment the little boy opened the book, he traveled to the dino world in the book.He saw 12 different dinosaurs,and when he pressed the button corresponding to the dinosaur icon,the dino let out a roar.He doesn't know the dinosaur's name,so he presses the corresponding icon in story mode.At this time,the introduction and story of the dinosaur slowly sounded in his ears,which was amazing.

【Multi-Function Board】Compare with other,our dinosaur book has 3 learning modes.Included dinosaur names and sounds,story modeand Q&A mode.In addition,we also thoughtfully designed the volume button and switch button. Kids can enjoy learning knowledge of dinosaur and do the test during playing dino animal figurines.

【12 Realistic Dinosaur Figures】This dinosaur toys set includes 12pcs dino figures,including Tyrannosaurus Rex,Spinosaurus,Stegosaurus,Brachiosaurus and so on.They are made of safe durable PVC material and an exquisite hand-painted process.The various realistic dino fighting shapes,which stand firm and not easy to fall,and the size design is suitable for small hands. Kids can play it anywhere.

【STEM Educational Toys】Each page of this dino book provides you with knowledge about the living habits and size comparisons of each dinosaur through exquisite illustrations and interesting introductions. The beautiful inner pages are made of thick cardboard, which is not easy to tear. Children can learn while playing, which will satisfy their curiosity, stimulate their imagination, and develop good reading habits.

【Desirable Present For Kids】Our jurassic dinosaurier set will spark hours of imaginative play.Make away your kids from electronics and let your child's imagination run.This is a desirable present for boys and girls 3 4 5 6 7 for birthday party,Easter,Christmas,Halloween,Thanksgiving,New Years.

Our dinosaur toys come with a dinosaur electronic learning book!The electronic board on the right side of the book has more functions than other electronic boards.Includes Dinosaur Roar,Story Mode,Volume Adjustment and Quiz Mode. 12PCS Realistic Dinosaur These dinosaur figure are made of durable PVC and there is no peculiar smell, plus hand-painted craftsmanship, which makes them more durable and realistic. Great Toys for Kids This educational dinosaur book can immerse your kids in the dinosaur world,make your kids away from electronics.It very suitable as present for kids at Birthday party,Christmas,Halloween or any Holidays.
